summary: Block 127: Global Groove Adaptive UI - All tests PASS. State dropdown conditional rendering, optional field labels, and near-you API endpoint all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 127 adaptive UI testing complete. Verified: (1) State dropdown removed from DOM when Country is not US - PASS, (2) State dropdown present when Country is US - PASS, (3) City label shows '(Optional)' - PASS, (4) Postal/ZIP Code label shows '(Optional)' - PASS, (5) State label does NOT show '(Optional)' - PASS, (6) Switching from US to non-US removes State dropdown - PASS. Backend tests verified: GET /api/explore/near-you returns valid collectors/listings/needs_location structure, PUT /api/auth/me correctly saves state and postal_code fields.

verified_features.feature: State dropdown removed from DOM when Country is not US
verified_features.notes: data-testid='settings-state' not found when country is empty, GB, or CA

verified_features.feature: State dropdown present when Country is US
verified_features.notes: data-testid='settings-state' appears immediately after selecting US
Label text is 'City (Optional)' with subtle italic styling
Label text is 'ZIP Code (Optional)' for US, 'Postal Code (Optional)' for non-US
Label text is just 'State' - State is required for US matching logic

verified_features.feature: Switching country from US to non-US removes State
verified_features.notes: State dropdown removed from DOM when switching from US to CA
Returns valid response with collectors array, listings array, needs_location boolean
state field correctly persisted and returned in user response
postal_code field correctly persisted and returned in user response
Backend uses state/region matching for US users
Backend uses country matching for non-US users
